name: TokenTable
description: Tabular token documentation for /system: custom property, raw DTCG value (references intact) and a live swatch for colours.

useCases: Token documentation sections on /system, fed by flattenTokens()

antiPatterns.scenario: Hand-writing token rows instead of importing the DTCG JSON
antiPatterns.reason: Docs that are not generated from the token source can drift from it.

a11y: Real <table> with scope=col headers and an aria-label
Swatches are aria-hidden; the value is always shown as text
